name: pave
description: Plan, Approve, Verify, Execute: a Codex plugin for session-based agentic development workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, approve, verify, and execute software work.
interface.longDescription: PAVE installs a session-based development workflow for project initialization, feature work, bug fixes, reviews, documentation sync, verification, and bounded specialist subagent briefs.
defaultPrompt: Use $pave to fix this bug with verification.
